name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions Nginx with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test, ci, status), full security hardening via UFW firewall, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, kernel-level sysctl network hardening, and per-site self-signed TLS certificate generation. Includes a custom lineinfile Chef resource for idempotent file-line management.

name: cache
description: Provisions a dual caching layer with Memcached (via community cookbook) and Redis (via redisio community cookbook) with password authentication. Includes a post-install Ruby block hack to strip deprecated Redis replica configuration directives that cause failures with newer Redis versions.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI application including system package installation, Git repository clone, Python virtual environment setup, pip dependency installation, PostgreSQL database and user provisioning, .env configuration file generation, and a systemd service unit creation and enablement.
